summary: Successfully verified and confirmed implementation of intelligence-grade recap emails with sentiment analysis, investor insights, question tracking, and suggested follow-ups. The sendRecapEmail() function in webhook.ts already fully implements all requirements from the brief including LLM analysis, sentiment mapping, call grading, question summaries, and rich email formatting. Database migration completed successfully with analysis column added.
learnings: The sendRecapEmail() implementation was already comprehensive and met all D2.1 requirements exactly
Database migration v2 successfully added analysis JSON column and all supporting tables
Question summary format matches brief specification with emoji quality indicators
LLM analysis includes sentiment, call grade (A/B/C/D), interests, concerns, follow-ups, and notable quotes
Rich email format includes collapsible transcript and structured intelligence report sections
Error handling gracefully falls back to basic email format if LLM analysis fails
